family.description: Specifies the image family to which this image belongs, enabling access to the latest non-deprecated image in the family.

filter.description: Defines the filter expression to select specific Compute Engine images based on labels or properties; must follow the Google Cloud filter syntax.

most_recent.description: Specifies whether to use the most recent image matching the family name. Must be true or false.

name.description: Specifies the name of the image; must be unique within the project and comply with naming conventions (lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens, starting with a letter).
